note: Tate Britain, London. Hand-maintained capture fixture. Refresh each season from tate.org.uk/visit/tate-britain. Future-opening only.

items.title: The 90s: Art and Fashion
items.description: Art, photography, fashion, and British visual culture in the 1990s — guest-curated by Edward Enninful; nearly seventy artists, photographers, and designers

items.title: Vanessa Bell & Duncan Grant: Inside Bloomsbury
items.description: 300+ works — portraits, still lifes, landscapes, decorative art, furniture, ceramics, textiles, and material connected to Charleston
